name: Strategize X
official_rules_text: When a unit makes the Strategize X action, it gains 1 Suppression token, then chooses X allied units within 2. Each chosen unit gains 1 Aim token and 1 Dodge token.
description: When a unit makes the Strategize X action, it gains 1 Suppression token, then chooses X allied units within 2. Each chosen unit gains 1 Aim token and 1 Dodge token.
